title: The Bomb Must Be Stopped
description: On pages 17–18, this part focuses on the bomb must be stopped, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Bomb Must Be Stopped. The crew and Alabasta’s defenders race against time to stop the cannon before the city is destroyed. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.
